title.en: So, he was in a hurry to leave.

content.en:
The Lord of Cangyu asked Ye Tian to stay a few more days, and wanted to discuss the knowledge of time with Ye Tian, focusing on wanting to study the super god-level time talent.

Ye Tian had inherited such a great opportunity from the Lord of Cangyu, if it weren't for the Lord of Cangyu, he wouldn't have been able to enter the Temple of Time, so he naturally agreed.

In the next few years, Ye Tian stayed in the Cangyu Realm, discussing the Dao of Time with the Lord of Cangyu.

When discussing with the Lord of Cangyu, Ye Tian occasionally comprehended the time chapter, and even said a little bit of concept or understanding on the first part of the time chapter, which benefited the Lord of Cangyu a lot, and he was shocked from time to time.

Three years later, although the Lord of Cangyu still wanted Ye Tian to stay, Ye Tian still decided to leave.

After all, this is the territory of the Lord of Cangyu, and if he is here, he can't cultivate with peace of mind, and he is also worried that he will expose too many flaws and expose his secrets.

So, he was in a hurry to leave.

Seeing that Ye Tian was so persistent about leaving, the Lord of Cangyu didn't hold back much, and directly escorted Ye Tian back to the human race.

......

Terran, Tianlan Giant City.

Ye Tian is back!

After coming back, Ye Tian told his wife Xiao Yue about the matter, and then entered the retreat.

This time, he was going to retreat a little longer, mainly in the time chapter.

If he can comprehend the first part of the time chapter a little bit, his strength will be fully improved, and he will have more means to deal with the enemy.

However, not long after Ye Tian entered the retreat, someone came to visit.

Pavilion Hall.

Ye Tian saw the person who came, and it was his disciple Zhou Tian.

"Zhou Tian has seen Shizun!"

Ye Tian knelt directly on the ground and postrarseed.

"Sunday, get up!"

Ye Tian also knew that the reason why Zhou Tianxing made such a big gift must be because he let the Lord of Cangyu resurrect him.

"Yes, Master!"

Zhou Tian stood up, but still did not sit down.

"Sit down!"

Ye Tian said.

At this time, Zhou Tiancai sat down.

"How's the recovery?"

Ye Tian asked.

After the resurrection, it is not completely restored, for example, the fairy soul needs to get through the impact of time, after all, he was resurrected from the past, although he has a complete memory, but the fairy soul is equivalent to crossing the time dimension, it is difficult for ordinary people to bear such an impact, and it takes a long time to get rid of the disadvantages brought by time.

In addition, he has just been resurrected, and his physical body is relatively weak, and he also needs to recover.

"Thanks to the master-honored relationship, the disciple has fully recovered!"

Zhou Tian said respectfully.

"Yes, don't take on tasks in the near future, take a good rest, and stabilize your foundation by the way!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Yes, Master!"

Zhou Tian responded.

Suddenly, Zhou Tian said again: "Master, in fact, it is not an accident that the disciple was robbed this time!"

"Oh, could it be that there is another reason?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"That's good!" Zhou Tiandao said: "Shizun should know very well that I was attacked and killed in a small clan, and that small clan is called the Tiemu Clan! The Tiemu Clan is just a small clan, and there are not even strong people in the Tianzun realm in the clan, only a few masters. It stands to reason that such a small clan is very aware of the consequences of attacking our human race, even if there is an angel clan as a backer, under normal circumstances, they would not dare to do it. But the Ironwood attacked me and severely injured one of the lords of the Terrans, and the real reason was not that the Angels gave the order, it was just that the Ironwood Clan pushed the cause to the Angels. It is true that the Temuzu clan has already taken refuge in the angel clan, but the angel clan should not have given an order to Temujin, but our human race did not ask the angel clan for verification, and the angel clan probably will not investigate the reason for such a small matter. The real reason for this incident is that I discovered a secret of the Temu Clan, and it should have been discovered by the Temu Clan later, so I did it, and by the way, I wanted to go directly to the Angel Clan with the credit of killing me. But what they never expected was that the Angel Clan did not immediately accept the Temu Clan, and the Human Clan's actions were very fast, so they destroyed the Temu Clan as soon as possible. As soon as the Temu clan died, no one knew the secret. "

"What's the secret?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

Although the Temu clan is only a small clan, it is also safe and stable under the protection of the human race, and in addition, it has secretly taken refuge in the angel clan, which can be regarded as a source of left and right, and it is very free.

What is the secret that made them kill Zhou Tian at such a risk, and not take the safety of the whole clan seriously.

"Master, have you ever heard of the Ancient Tree of Life?" asked Zhou Tian.

"I've heard of it, the Ancient Tree of Life, the Ancient Tree of Chaos, and the legendary Ancient Tree of Destruction, and are known as the three ancient trees of the universe!" Ye Tian said: "Among them, the Ancient Tree of Chaos appears the most, and the Ancient Tree of Destruction is only mentioned in the ancient books of other cosmic eras, and although the Ancient Tree of Life has appeared, it is very rare, it is rumored that the Ancient Tree of Life can make people immortal, even if they are mortals, if they take the sap of the Ancient Tree of Life, they will also have an eternal and immortal lifespan." Could it be that you found the Ancient Tree of Life in the Temu Clan?"

"Yes, Master!" Zhou Tian hurriedly said: "I entered that place by mistake, and then after I came out, I went to the library of the Tiemu clan and flipped through the books, because at first I didn't know that it was the Ancient Tree of Life, and then I carefully checked the books and learned about the existence of the Ancient Tree of Life." Perhaps it was because of my access to books that the secrets of the place I had been to were revealed, and the Temu clan retaliated. The Temu are worried that I will tell the Terrans this secret, and the end of the Temu will almost come to an end. That's why they're so desperate!"

"The Ancient Tree of Life!!

Ye Tian was also extremely excited, this is the Supreme Treasure Ancient Tree that even the Supreme has longed for!

But what made him even more excited was that there was hope that the Tianyuan True Law would impact the sixth layer.

He had only cultivated the Tianyuan True Fa to the fifth level now, and his life level had reached the fifth level.

As a fifth-order life, he is now very rebellious, and if he reaches the sixth order of life, it will be even more rebellious.

But all along, Ye Tian didn't think about cultivating the Tianyuan True Method, because to impact the sixth order of life, it was necessary to cultivate the Tianyuan True Law to the sixth layer, and the medium needed to impact the sixth layer of the Tianyuan True Law was the sap of the Ancient Tree of Life, and it was a large amount of sap.

Therefore, Ye Tian had to find an Ancient Tree of Life in order to be able to successfully cultivate the sixth layer of the Tianyuan True Method.

But the Ancient Tree of Life is so rare, even the things that the Supreme Longs for, once born, will definitely attract many Supreme Beings to fight.

Therefore, Ye Tian did not expect to find the Ancient Tree of Life.

Unexpectedly, now Zhou Tian has brought him the news of the Ancient Tree of Life!

"Sunday, I really need the Ancient Tree of Life, and I'm glad you came to tell me. But are you really willing to share the Ancient Tree of Life with me?"

Ye Tian asked seriously.

Zhou Tian hurriedly said seriously: "Master, the disciple is already dead, if it weren't for the master, the disciple doesn't know how many years it will take for the human race to be resurrected, and even forever forgotten." Therefore, the disciple's life is the master's. If the master needs it, the disciple is willing to dedicate all the ancient trees of life to the master!"

"No, if we really get the Ancient Tree of Life, we can just take the ordinary!"

Ye Tiandao.

Immediately, Ye Tian discussed with Zhou Tian the location of the Ancient Tree of Life.

Soon, Ye Tian finally knew the location of the Ancient Tree of Life.

It turned out that there was a inheritance space in the Tiemu Clan, and there were several entrances to this inheritance space, but the Tiemu Clan missed an entrance, and Zhou Tian happened to step into that inheritance entrance, and after meeting the conditions, he entered the inheritance space.

It was precisely because he entered the inheritance space that he saw the Ancient Tree of Life and some of the Ironwood people stationed around the Ancient Tree of Life.

Because Zhou Tian carried a secret treasure and used the secret treasure to evade the induction, he was not discovered.

"Master, that inheritance space allows the galaxy level to enter it at most, so the Tiemu people in that inheritance space are only at the peak of the galaxy level at most. Although the Terrans wiped out the Ironwood Clan in an instant, the Ironwood Clan in that inheritance space should still be alive. The strength of the disciple is not enough, even if he enters it, he will not be able to obtain the Ancient Tree of Life, so this time I will count on the master!"

Zhou Tian said.

"Okay, but let's go and be secretive, so as not to be followed. Especially you, who have just been resurrected, it is not advisable to go over recently, otherwise it will attract the attention of others, wait a few more days!"

Ye Tian proposed.

"Yes, Master!"

Zhou Tian responded.
